steps: Verify initial staff assignments and headquarters effect
Assign Weber to chief of staff while he was quartermaster
Verify Weber appears in only one staff slot and quartermaster is cleared
Select Weber's brigade and verify staff-duty burden in command summary
Open Officers tab and verify staff-duty burden lines
Open Deployment and verify adjusted headquarters reserve and command capacity
Start battle and verify BattleUnit command summaries include staff-duty burden

initialStaff: 大佐 アルンハイム
observed.armyEffectAfterChange: 司令部効果: 出撃枠+1 / 指揮容量+189 / 予備即応+15
observed.weberArmyCommandSummary: 指揮容量 580/949 / 司令部 容量+189 / 参謀兼任 負荷-120 / 予備: 即応+12 統制+2 容量+160
observed.deploymentLedger: 軍団司令部 出撃+1 / 予備+15
observed.battleWeberCommandSummary: 指揮容量 580/949 / 司令部 容量+189 / 参謀兼任 負荷-120
observed.battleMetzCommandSummary: 指揮容量 210/619 / 司令部 容量+189 / 参謀兼任 負荷-70

notes: Mobile QA intentionally skipped because mobile is not a current target.
This pass implements one officer per staff slot and command-capacity burden for officers who also command a brigade. Longer-term fatigue, political cost, and staff-only officer pools remain deferred.
